name: Rydell High School RPG
description:
Welcome to Rydell High School!

Situated in sunny California, Rydell is where students from all walks of life come together, blending greaser cool with preppy charm. From the polished halls to the lively malt shops just down the street, Rydell High is alive with the energy of young love, wild adventures, and the occasional dose of high school drama.

Rydell is more than just a school—it’s a cultural melting pot. You'll find the rebellious T-Birds in their leather jackets, always up to something mischievous. The Pink Ladies, the queens of sass and style, rule the social scene with their sharp tongues and iconic pink jackets. Meanwhile, there are studious kids dreaming of brighter futures, athletes perfecting their game for the next big meet, and music enthusiasts who might just break into song when the mood strikes.

At Rydell, everyone’s part of a story. Whether it’s cruising down the boulevard in a hot rod, stealing the show at the school dance, or navigating the ups and downs of teenage romance, life at Rydell High is never boring.
creator: 90sflower
